summary: A clipped excerpt of VP JD Vance's White House press-briefing remarks on Iran ('Iran cannot have a nuclear weapon'), packaged for social with a red headline card, burned-in captions, and a 'TEXT VP TO 45470' lower-third. Despite the title-card framing it remains a static talking-head quote with no music, B-roll, or cinematic/genre treatment. Out of scope: a captioned speech excerpt, not a music-driven cinematic montage.
notable_text: VP JD Vance On Iran Negotiations, "Iran Cannot Have a Nuclear Weapon"; TEXT "VP" TO 45470 FOR UPDATES FROM THE WHITE HOUSE; THE WHITE HOUSE
